rules.rule_text:
title: Interactive Bash Suspicious Children
id: ea3ecad2-db86-4a89-ad0b-132a10d2db55
status: test
description: Detects suspicious interactive bash as a parent to rather uncommon child
  processes
references:
- Internal Research
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-03-14
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1059.004
- attack.t1036
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    ParentCommandLine: bash -i
  anomaly1:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - '-c import '
    - base64
    - pty.spawn
  anomaly2:
    Image|endswith:
    - whoami
    - iptables
    - /ncat
    - /nc
    - /netcat
  condition: selection and 1 of anomaly*
falsepositives:
- Legitimate software that uses these patterns
level: medium
